title: Media essentials
description: Useful words for news, journalism, websites, and online platforms.

items.meaning: a source of information that can be trusted
items.example: It is important to check whether a news story comes from a reliable source.

items.meaning: to share news or facts with many people
items.example: Social media can spread information very quickly.

items.meaning: a website or app where people interact or publish content
items.example: Many young people get their news from an online platform.

items.meaning: the amount and type of attention a story gets in the media
items.example: Major events usually receive global media coverage.

items.meaning: content that gives a false or confusing impression
items.example: Misleading information can spread faster than corrections.

items.meaning: to stay informed about recent events
items.example: I use podcasts to keep up with the news.
